message:
Update smoke tests for parakeet-rs backend name

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -98,7 +98,7 @@ if "live-recording-" not in source_wav_path.name:
 if not entry.get("transcript_text", "").strip():
     raise SystemExit(f"Transcript log entry is missing transcript_text: {entry}")
 
-if entry.get("backend_name") != "sherpa-onnx":
+if entry.get("backend_name") != "parakeet-rs":
     raise SystemExit(f"Unexpected backend_name in transcript log: {entry}")
 
 if stdout_transcript != entry["transcript_text"]:

@@ -9,10 +9,10 @@ if ! command -v cargo >/dev/null 2>&1 && [[ -f "${HOME}/.cargo/env" ]]; then
     . "${HOME}/.cargo/env"
 fi
 
-asr_model_id="nemo-parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2-int8"
+asr_model_id="nemotron-speech-streaming-en-0.6b"
 alternate_asr_model_id="nemo-parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3-int8"
-cleanup_model_id="qwen2.5-3b-instruct-q4_k_m.gguf"
-alternate_cleanup_model_id="qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct-q4_k_m.gguf"
+cleanup_model_id="qwen3.5-2b-q4_k_m.gguf"
+alternate_cleanup_model_id="qwen3.5-0.8b-q4_k_m.gguf"
 offline_mode=0
 
 if [[ "${1:-}" == "--offline" ]]; then

@@ -66,7 +66,7 @@ if source_wav_path != fixture_path:
         f"{source_wav_path} != {fixture_path}"
     )
 
-if entry.get("backend_name") != "sherpa-onnx":
+if entry.get("backend_name") != "parakeet-rs":
     raise SystemExit(f"Unexpected backend_name in transcript log: {entry}")
 
 if not entry.get("model_name", "").strip():
